Interface IJSONDeserializer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to high-level JSON deserialization methods.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1E6DC0EB-5C8A-4401-A8AF-BB5602DDFB7E")]
public interface IJSONDeserializer : IExternalDeserializer

Reader

Obtains JSON Reader.
